common:class.#text: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
Electric power generation, transmission and distribution activities
Electric power transmission and distribution activities

common:generalComment.#text: 本数据集代表在特定地理区域，终端用户在低压（LV, <1kV）电网上（例如家庭或办公室插座）实际消耗的平均电力。它以“电力生产组合”（电厂侧）为基础，并核算了电力从发电厂传输到低压用户所需的全部累计电网损失（高压+中压+低压损失）以及全部累计电网基础设施。

This dataset represents the average electricity actually consumed by end-users on the low-voltage (LV, <1kV) grid (e.g., residential or office sockets) in a specific geographical area. It is based on the "electricity production mix" (at power plant) and accounts for the full cumulative grid losses (HV + MV + LV losses) and full cumulative grid infrastructure required to deliver power from the plant to the LV user.

technologyDescriptionAndIncludedProcesse.#text: 此过程汇总了向低压（<1kV）用户交付1千瓦时（kWh）电力所需的所有电力系统内部活动。 背景系统（部分终止）：内部包含： (1) 所有发电技术的运行及关键产品上游（例如发电的燃料（煤炭、天然气等）的上游开采、加工和运输链）；(2) 全部电网（高压、中压、低压）的运行（即累计电力损失）；(3) 发电厂和全部电网的建设和维护（表示为对大宗材料和设备的需求）。终止（切断）： 本数据集的清单不包含（即已切断）用于建设和维护的材料（钢材、水泥等）的上游生产链。

This process aggregates all intra-power-system activities required to deliver 1 kWh of electricity to a low-voltage (<1kV) user. Background system (Partially Terminated):Included internally: (1) The operation of all generation technologies and supply chain of key components（e.g., upstream extraction, processing, and transport chains for the fuels (coal, natural gas, etc.)）; (2) The operation of the entire grid (HV, MV, LV) (i.e., cumulative electricity losses); (3) The construction and maintenance of power plants and the entire grid (represented as demands for bulk materials and equipment).Terminated (Cut-off): The inventory for this dataset excludes (i.e., has cut-off) the upstream production chains for materials (steel, cement, etc.) used in construction/maintenance.

dataCutOffAndCompletenessPrinciples.#text: 本清单遵循了既定的切断规则。在完整性方面，本数据集已包含所有已知的、对系统功能有显著贡献的物质流、能量流和排放流。

This inventory follows established cut-off rules. Regarding completeness, this dataset includes all known elementary flows, energy flows, and emissions that significantly contribute to the system's function.

common:intendedApplications.#text: To be used as the standard input in LCA for all activities consuming electricity from the low-voltage (<1kV) grid. E.g., residential households, offices, small commercial, and any equipment using a standard wall socket.
用作LCA中所有从低压（<1kV）电网消耗电力的活动的标准输入。例如：家庭用电、办公室、小型商业、以及任何使用标准插座的设备。

publicationAndOwnership.common:licenseType: Free of charge for all users and uses
